# GIT repos

* cpr - https://github.com/libcpr/cpr
* curl - https://github.com/curl/curl
* freetype - https://github.com/freetype/freetype
* glaze - https://github.com/stephenberry/glaze
* harfbuzz - https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz
* imgui - https://github.com/ocornut/imgui
* LuaJIT - https://github.com/LuaJIT/LuaJIT
* lunasvg - https://github.com/sammycage/lunasvg
* rlottie - https://github.com/Samsung/rlottie
* RmlUi - https://github.com/mikke89/RmlUi
* SDL - https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL
* SDL_image - https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL_image
* spdlog - https://github.com/gabime/spdlog

# Non-GIT repos

* mbedtls - https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls Just download it from the Releases page.
* - It is also recommended that you delete the folders containing unused tests and modules (including subfolders): `docs`, `programs`, `test`, `tests`, `examples`, `scripts`, and `data_files`.
